definition: Search Engine Optimization: earning rankings in Google's blue-link results. Success measured in keyword positions, CTR, organic sessions.
Answer Engine Optimization: structuring content so AI engines extract discrete passages as answers. Uses question headings, FAQ blocks.
Generative Engine Optimization: earning citations inside AI-generated answers from ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini. Measured in mention rate.
Search via AI engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini). Synthesizes single answer, names 2-5 brands. Mention = conversion event.
Search where user doesn't click any result. AI Overviews trigger, answer displayed on page. Grew from 56% to 69% in 12 months.
Retrieval-Augmented Generation: AI pipeline that selects content based on authority, structure, factual density before generating answers.
